domain: Kyrgyz yurt boz uy (UNESCO ICH): kerege willow/birch lattice wall (interlaced rope-fixed no nails) + uuk curved roof poles (arc under tension) + tunduk circular wooden crown wheel (load-bearing apex on national flag) + koshma 100% wool felt cover (thermal + moisture + pest resistant); light self-supporting frame; load distributed via uuk to tunduk arch; collapsible round structure
specific_mechanism: BOZUY-KEREGE-UUK-TUNDUK-BASIN: basin-stability with 4-component structural decomposition. (1) Kerege lattice wall = K_l interlaced rank-1 LoRA constraints on parameters; each 'lattice cross' is a rank-1 constraint pairing 2 weight directions; full lattice forms structured low-rank manifold M_lat. (2) Uuk arc-under-tension poles = curved gradient-path constraints from boundary weights toward tunduk-center: for each (w_i, w_j) on the arc, ||w_i - tunduk_proj(w_i, w_j)|| <= eps (load redistribution). (3) Tunduk central crown = shared low-dim hub h ∈ R^d_h in parameter space; all gradient updates first project to tunduk-subspace before applying (single shared anchor — d_h << d). (4) Koshma felt insulation = output Gaussian-perturbation buffer: post-forward output is smoothed via k_felt random Gaussian noise samples averaged (matches felt's moisture/perturbation resistance — analog of Gaussian-augmented optimizer GO from Basin-Like 2505.17646). (5) Self-supporting basin: trained model lies in basin enclosed by lattice (low-rank) + uuk (tension) + tunduk (anchor) constraints; Gaussian perturbations < eps_basin stay in basin. (6) Differs from R485 JABAL-DRUZE-CHOKEPOINT-BASIN (angular cone alignment direction) and R498 MORAY-12-LEVEL-BASIN (per-level temperature schedule) by lattice-arch-crown 4-component structural decomposition + tunduk-projection central anchor + felt-Gaussian output smoothing buffer.
llm_application: BOZUY-KEREGE-UUK-TUNDUK-BASIN K_l interlaced rank-1 LoRA lattice constraint + uuk arc-under-tension curved gradient-path constraint + tunduk shared low-dim hub anchor projection + koshma k_felt Gaussian output-smoothing perturbation buffer. Differs from R404 SAN-N!UM. R420 SIKH. R434 ZOU-HUN. R450 LAAGER (closest — fortress formation). R460 LEVADE. R471 CAPOEIRA ginga. R485 JABAL-DRUZE-CHOKEPOINT-BASIN (closest — angular chokepoint). R498 MORAY-12-LEVEL-BASIN (closest — per-level temperature). Differs from Basin-Like Loss Landscape 2505.17646 (closest — basin emergence + GO optimizer, single mechanism) + Flat-LoRA + LoRA-MGPO + LLMLandscape by 4-component lattice+arch+crown+felt decomposition + tunduk central-anchor projection. Differs by LATTICE+ARCH+CROWN+FELT 4-COMPONENT + TUNDUK PROJECTION ANCHOR.
novelty_claim: Basin-Like Loss Landscape + Flat-LoRA + LoRA-MGPO + Gaussian-augmented optimizer literature cover basin-stability + Gaussian-perturbation space. BOZUY-KEREGE-UUK-TUNDUK-BASIN adds (a) interlaced rank-1 lattice constraint + (b) arc-under-tension weight-pair constraint + (c) tunduk shared low-dim hub anchor projection + (d) felt-Gaussian k_felt output smoothing. Recombination — borderline lookup.
